options.name: -break_at_conflict
options.description: Enable tool exit from fixing violations when run into rules conflict. User should fix conflict rules then re-run fix_floorplan

options.name: -file
options.description: Specify the rule or constraint file name

options.name: -honor_snap_block_grid
options.description: Specify to honor block snap grid defined by setFPlanMode -snapBlockGrid or set_db floorplan_snap_block_grid

options.name: -report_file
options.description: Specify the report file name to save the report summary.

options.name: -report_unplaced_block
options.description: Enable tool to show the number of unplaced macros in summary

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specify to fix violations by moving only the selected objects. Now only support to select macros.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specify the type of input file. Now only ufc and tcic files are supported.
